name: io.github.CodeAlive-AI/codealive-mcp
description: Semantic code search and analysis from CodeAlive for AI assistants and agents.

environmentVariables.name: CODEALIVE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your CodeAlive API key. Get one at https://app.codealive.ai/ under MCP & API.

tools.name: get_data_sources
tools.description: Retrieve all available repositories and workspaces indexed in your CodeAlive account. Use this first to discover what codebases you can search and analyze.

tools.name: codebase_search
tools.description: Deprecated legacy semantic search tool retained for backward compatibility.

tools.name: semantic_search
tools.description: Default discovery tool — search by meaning to find code by concepts, behavior, or architecture.

tools.name: grep_search
tools.description: Find code containing a specific string or regex — identifiers, error messages, config keys, patterns.

tools.name: chat
tools.description: Synthesized codebase Q&A. Do NOT call unless the user explicitly names this tool (e.g. 'use chat'). 'Ask CodeAlive' means use search tools, not chat. Slow (up to 30 seconds).

tools.name: codebase_consultant
tools.description: Deprecated alias for chat retained for backward compatibility.

tools.name: fetch_artifacts
tools.description: Retrieve full source code of artifacts by their identifiers from search results. Returns content with line numbers and a preview of call relationships (outgoing and incoming calls).

tools.name: get_artifact_relationships
tools.description: Explore an artifact's relationships — call graph, inheritance hierarchy, or references. Drill down after search or fetch to understand how code connects across the codebase.
